'''âh-w-n''' ('''kahawan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jant|jant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jant|jant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-w-n
|-
! Lemma
| kahawan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihawan|thihawan]] || [[word:jihawan|jihawan]] || [[word:shihawan|shihawan]] || [[word:kihawan|kihawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhawan|thuthuhawan]] || [[word:jujuhawan|jujuhawan]] || [[word:shushuhawan|shushuhawan]] || [[word:kukuhawan|kukuhawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhawan|thuhawan]] || [[word:juhawan|juhawan]] || [[word:shuhawan|shuhawan]] || [[word:kuhawan|kuhawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhawan|thuhawan]] || [[word:juhawan|juhawan]] || [[word:shuhawan|shuhawan]] || [[word:kuhawan|kuhawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehawan|thehawan]] || [[word:jehawan|jehawan]] || [[word:shehawan|shehawan]] || [[word:kehawan|kehawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohawan|thothohawan]] || [[word:jojohawan|jojohawan]] || [[word:shoshohawan|shoshohawan]] || [[word:kokohawan|kokohawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohawan|thohawan]] || [[word:johawan|johawan]] || [[word:shohawan|shohawan]] || [[word:kohawan|kohawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohawan|thohawan]] || [[word:johawan|johawan]] || [[word:shohawan|shohawan]] || [[word:kohawan|kohawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhawan|thĂŠhawan]] || [[word:jĂŠhawan|jĂŠhawan]] || [[word:shĂŠhawan|shĂŠhawan]] || [[word:kĂŠhawan|kĂŠhawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahawan|thathahawan]] || [[word:jajahawan|jajahawan]] || [[word:shashahawan|shashahawan]] || [[word:kakahawan|kakahawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahawan|thahawan]] || [[word:jahawan|jahawan]] || [[word:shahawan|shahawan]] || [[word:kahawan|kahawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahawan|thahawan]] || [[word:jahawan|jahawan]] || [[word:shahawan|shahawan]] || [[word:kahawan|kahawan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahawan|shahawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahawan|goshahawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahawan|gokishahawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahawanĂŒ|shahawanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahawanknĂŒ|goshahawanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahawanĂŒ|gokishahawanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahawanshĂ«|shahawanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahawankshĂ«|goshahawankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahawanshĂ«|gokishahawanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahawanro|shahawanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahawankro|goshahawankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahawanro|gokishahawanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahawanmu|shahawanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahawankmu|goshahawankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahawanmu|gokishahawanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahawansher|shahawansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahawanksher|goshahawanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahawansher|gokishahawansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahawang|shahawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahawankng|goshahawankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahawang|gokishahawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahawanya|shahawanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahawankya|goshahawankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahawanya|gokishahawanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahawanyam|shahawanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahawankyam|goshahawankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahawanyam|gokishahawanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahawanĂŒshĂ«|shahawanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahawanknĂŒshĂ«|goshahawanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahawanĂŒshĂ«|gokishahawanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahawanĂŒro|shahawanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahawanknĂŒro|goshahawanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahawanĂŒro|gokishahawanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahawanĂŒmu|shahawanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahawanknĂŒmu|goshahawanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahawanĂŒmu|gokishahawanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahawanshĂ«nĂŒ|shahawanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahawankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahawankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahawanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahawanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahawanshĂ«ro|shahawanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahawankshĂ«ro|goshahawankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahawanshĂ«ro|gokishahawanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahawanshĂ«mu|shahawanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahawankshĂ«mu|goshahawankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahawanshĂ«mu|gokishahawanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahawanronĂŒ|shahawanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahawankronĂŒ|goshahawankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahawanronĂŒ|gokishahawanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahawanroshĂ«|shahawanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahawankroshĂ«|goshahawankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahawanroshĂ«|gokishahawanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahawanromu|shahawanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahawankromu|goshahawankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahawanromu|gokishahawanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahawanmunĂŒ|shahawanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahawankmunĂŒ|goshahawankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahawanmunĂŒ|gokishahawanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahawanmushĂ«|shahawanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahawankmushĂ«|goshahawankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahawanmushĂ«|gokishahawanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahawanmuro|shahawanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahawankmuro|goshahawankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahawanmuro|gokishahawanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
